business.name: Pensacola Electrician
business.tagline: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled

hero.headline: When the power's out, *we're already on the way*
hero.subheadline: No guesswork. No delays. Just reliable electrical work from licensed pros who know Pensacola wiring inside and out.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Electrical Solutions That Actually Work
services_section.subheading: From blown fuses to full rewires, we handle the electrical challenges Pensacola homes and businesses face every day

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.description: Old panels can't handle modern electrical loads. We upgrade breaker boxes to keep your power flowing safely and efficiently.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Need more outlets or switches that actually work? We wire new ones exactly where you need them, code compliant every time.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Ceiling fans, recessed lights, outdoor fixtures — we handle the wiring so your lights work the first time you flip the switch.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, tripped breakers — when electrical problems can't wait, we respond fast to get you back online.

about.heading: Licensed Electricians Serving Pensacola
about.body: We're the electrical contractors Pensacola calls when the job needs to be done right. Licensed, insured, and experienced with everything from simple repairs to complex commercial installations. When your power matters, we deliver reliable electrical solutions.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Electrical Service Throughout the Gulf Coast
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical contractors serving Pensacola and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Electrical Problems?
cta.body: Don't wait for electrical issues to get worse. Get a free estimate from licensed electricians who know Pensacola wiring.
